text.title: Continuous Delivery (Index) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all CD prerequisites in place (CI + tests + IaC + flags)?

text.example: Team has CI + tests but no IaC → router classifies prereqs == not_met → emits decision_record pointing to cd-basics with rationale 'IaC missing'.
